Versioned REST API for Factorial HRIS. Path prefix includes a date
version (e.g. /api/2026-04-01/resources). Common HR resources
include employees, contracts, compensations, shifts, attendance,
overtime, leaves/time off, locations, payroll, documents, custom
fields, expenses, projects, and performance. Authentication
supports API keys (Bearer tokens) and OAuth 2.0 via the Factorial
developer portal.
